About IHU

Ibn Haldun University’s (IHU) motto is Intellectual Independence.

Ibn Haldun University (IHU) aims to stand out as a "research university" in Turkey and in the world with the quality of education it provides and the research projects it conducts. Ibn Haldun University is a foundation university founded by TÜRGEV. It was opened in 2015 and started education in the 2017-2018 Academic Year.

Our university is truly a “foundation university” and all of our undergraduate students and approximately 80% of our graduate students receive full scholarships.

All education at our university is carried out in Fatih-Suleymaniye Campus (Suleymaniye Complex madrasas), Bakırköy-Taş Mektep Campus and Başaksehir-Ibn Haldun University Complex. Ibn Haldun Complex was built in Başakşehir, modeled on Ottoman madrasah architecture, and was commissioned in October-2020.

As of June-2025, there are 359 academicians and lecturers working at IHU, which has a distinguished and internationally recognized academic staff.

Education continues in the following 6 faculties and 12 departments within IHU:

*School of Education

- Department of Guidance and Psychological Counseling

* School of Law

* School of Communication

- New Media and Communication Department

* School of Islamic Studies

* School of Humanities and Social Sciences

- Philosophy Department

- Department of Comparative Literature

- Psychology Department

- Department of Political Science and International Relations

- Department of Sociology

- History Department

* School of Business

- Department of Economics

There are 11 PhD and 27 master's programs within the School of Graduate Studies, and 1 PhD and 1 master's program within the Alliance of Civilizations Institute.

18 of our undergraduate and graduate programs have international FIBAA accreditation.

We have application and research centers in the fields of Argumentation and Debate Studies, Conflict Analysis and Peace Studies, Ethics Studies, Hadith Studies, Haydar Aliyev Eurasian Studies, Islamic Economics and Finance, Psychotherapy, Guidance and Psychological Counseling, Civil Society Studies, Oral History and Social Memory, Continuing Education, Savings Financing, Turkish Language Teaching, International Law and Human Rights and Dispute Resolution.

As of June-2025, 1,212 Turkish students and 574 international students from 74 different countries are studying at IHU, which has an international teaching environment. International students receive Turkish preparatory education. Our university is one of the few prominent universities in our country in providing an international education and training environment with a 32% international student rate.

IHU, where 961 of all students receive graduate education, has the highest rate of graduate students in Türkiye with 53%.

The languages of instruction at IHU are Turkish, Arabic and English. In addition, Western languages such as German, Spanish, Russian and French, as well as Eastern languages such as Chinese and Malay are taught as electives.
